subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-09-06
subcodes.first_line: Mount Carmel is enveloped with the white mantle of spirituality.... The divine, holy prophets have two stations.
subcodes.subjects: @contemplation, @station of the Manifestation of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @Mount Carmel, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
